issues.description: Missing entire second effect: '[Once Per Turn] If your {Straw Hat Crew} type Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may rest 1 of your Characters instead.' This is a counter/prevention ability that should trigger OnKO with condition checks.
Trigger should be 'StartOfTurn' not 'OnPlay'. Card text '[Your Turn]' indicates a continuous passive during your turn, not on card play.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text explicitly states '[Your Turn]' meaning effect is active only during your turn phase.
Target missing conditions: must filter for 'green', 'Straw Hat Crew' type, and 'base cost 4 or more'. Currently targets all own characters.
